problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Forward. Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
